name: get_submission
description: Check the status and details of a PDF generation submission. Use this to poll for completion when you submitted a PDF generation request without 'wait: true'. The state field will be 'pending', 'processed', 'invalid_data', or 'error'. Once state is 'processed', the download_url will be available to retrieve the generated PDF.

parameters.name: submission_id
parameters.description: The submission ID returned from the generate_pdf call.
